title: Nutty Silky Kabanos Sausage Stir-fry
description: A low-sodium-friendly, hearty dish that combines the nuttiness of kabanos sausages with a silky texture to make a comforting sick-day meal.

ingredients.name: Green onions
ingredients.notes: Chiffonade finely for extra flavor and texture

ingredients.name: Red pepper flakes
ingredients.notes: Optional, for extra heat and depth of flavor

ingredients.name: Fresh cilantro leaves
ingredients.notes: For garnish, add at the end to preserve color and texture

instructions: Preheat a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add sausages in a single layer and cook until they're golden brown and heated through.
Add finely chopped green onions, garlic, and red pepper flakes (if using). Stir-fry for about 1-2 minutes to allow the flavors to meld together.
Season with soy sauce according to taste. If you prefer no additional salt, reduce or omit if necessary.
Stir gently until everything is well combined and heated evenly. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh cilantro leaves. Enjoy your Nutty Silky Kabanos Sausage Stir-fry on a sick day or any time you're in need of comfort food.
